name: cscw-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for CSCW submissions: venue fit and CHI/ICWSM routing, the PACMHCI journal model with Revise-and-Resubmit rounds, PCS and Manuscript Central submission, qualitative and quantitative methods rigor, sensitive community-data ethics, response letters, and PACMHCI camera-ready production. Grounded in cscw.acm.org CFP pages, the rolling-model announcement, ACM DL PACMHCI issues, and dblp, checked on 2026-07-08.
